requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment — Georgian National Certification for Respiratory PPE (GeoSTM)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定——格鲁吉亚呼吸防护PPE国家认证（GeoSTM）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定——格魯吉亞呼吸防護PPE國家認證（GeoSTM）

summary.en: Respiratory PPE (filtering facepiece respirators / FFP masks) placed on the Georgian market must comply with applicable GeoSTM national standards and obtain national conformity certification through a body recognised by GeoSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology). Georgia's conformity assessment framework is GOST-based with progressive approximation towards EU technical standards under the EU-Georgia DCFTA. The process typically involves: (1) product testing against the applicable Georgian/GOST standard at an accredited laboratory; (2) issuance of a national conformity certificate by a GeoSTM-accredited certification body; (3) ongoing surveillance of certified products. Georgia does NOT apply the EAEU EAC conformity marking or TR CU 019/2011 conformity assessment modules. There is NO fully-in-force horizontal EU-style PPE framework (PPE Regulation 2016/425) in Georgia — the national GOST-derived rules apply. Market surveillance maturity is still developing.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的呼吸防护PPE（过滤式半面罩/FFP口罩）须符合适用的GeoSTM国家标准，并通过GeoSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）认可的机构取得国家合格认证。格鲁吉亚的合格评定框架以GOST为基础，在欧格深化全面自由贸易区协议框架下逐步向欧盟技术标准靠拢。流程通常包括：（1）在获认可实验室依据适用的格鲁吉亚/GOST标准对产品进行测试；（2）由GeoSTM认可的认证机构签发国家合格证书；（3）对认证产品进行持续监督。格鲁吉亚不采用欧亚经济联盟EAC合格标志或TR CU 019/2011合格评定模块。格鲁吉亚尚未全面施行横向欧盟式PPE框架（PPE法规2016/425）——适用以GOST为基础的国家规则。市场监督成熟度仍在发展中。
summary.zht: 投放格魯吉亞市場的呼吸防護PPE（過濾式半面罩/FFP口罩）須符合適用的GeoSTM國家標準，並通過GeoSTM（格魯吉亞國家標準與計量局）認可的機構取得國家合格認證。格魯吉亞的合格評定框架以GOST為基礎，在歐格深化全面自由貿易區協議框架下逐步向歐盟技術標準靠攏。流程通常包括：（1）在獲認可實驗室依據適用的格魯吉亞/GOST標準對產品進行測試；（2）由GeoSTM認可的認證機構簽發國家合格證書；（3）對認證產品進行持續監督。格魯吉亞不採用歐亞經濟聯盟EAC合格標誌或TR CU 019/2011合格評定模組。格魯吉亞尚未全面施行橫向歐盟式PPE框架（PPE法規2016/425）——適用以GOST為基礎的國家規則。市場監督成熟度仍在發展中。

standards_or_laws: GeoSTM national conformity certification framework — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology
GOST 12.4.294 / GOST 12.4.296 — respiratory protection standards (GOST-based, Georgian national adoption)
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — progressive technical approximation basis (not direct EU law)

summary.en: For industrial respiratory PPE under GB 2626-2019 (KN95/KN90), China applies a compulsory certification (CCC) scheme administered by CNCA and third-party certification bodies (e.g., CQC — China Quality Certification Centre). The conformity assessment involves type testing at a CNAS-accredited laboratory and factory inspection. For medical-protective masks (GB 19083), NMPA registration is required as a Class II medical device. Chinese CCC certificates and GB 2626 test reports are not established as directly equivalent to Georgian GeoSTM certification.
summary.zh: 对于依据GB 2626-2019（KN95/KN90）的工业呼吸防护PPE，中国实施强制性产品认证（CCC）制度，由国家认监委（CNCA）及第三方认证机构（如中国质量认证中心CQC）管理。合格评定包括CNAS认可实验室的型式检测及工厂检查。医用防护口罩（GB 19083）须作为II类医疗器械完成国家药品监督管理局（NMPA）注册。中国CCC证书及GB 2626检测报告与格鲁吉亚GeoSTM认证之间尚未建立直接等效关系。
summary.zht: 對於依據GB 2626-2019（KN95/KN90）的工業呼吸防護PPE，中國實施強制性產品認證（CCC）制度，由國家認監委（CNCA）及第三方認證機構（如中國質量認證中心CQC）管理。合格評定包括CNAS認可實驗室的型式檢測及工廠檢查。醫用防護口罩（GB 19083）須作為II類醫療器械完成國家藥品監督管理局（NMPA）注冊。中國CCC證書及GB 2626檢測報告與格魯吉亞GeoSTM認證之間尚未建立直接等效關係。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Non-powered air-purifying particle respirator (KN95/KN90) — CCC mandatory, SAMR/CNCA
GB 19083-2010 — Technical requirements for medical protective mask — NMPA Class II medical device registration

gap.en: Chinese CCC certificates or GB 2626 test reports do not automatically satisfy Georgian conformity requirements. Gaps include: (1) Georgian GeoSTM certification must be obtained from a GeoSTM-recognised body — Chinese domestic CCC does not substitute; (2) Test reports must reference the applicable Georgian/GOST standard, not only GB 2626; (3) Georgia does not accept EAEU EAC marking — exporters with EAC certificates for other CIS markets cannot assume coverage in Georgia; (4) Market surveillance in Georgia is still maturing, but customs and border procedures at Poti/Batumi may require conformity documentation on arrival; (5) Verify current GeoSTM-recognised certification bodies and applicable standard versions before commencing testing.
gap.zh: 中国CCC证书或GB 2626检测报告不自动满足格鲁吉亚合格评定要求。具体差距包括：（1）须从GeoSTM认可机构取得格鲁吉亚GeoSTM认证——中国国内CCC无法替代；（2）检测报告须引用适用的格鲁吉亚/GOST标准，而非仅引用GB 2626；（3）格鲁吉亚不接受欧亚经济联盟EAC标志——持有其他独联体市场EAC证书的出口商不能认为该证书覆盖格鲁吉亚；（4）格鲁吉亚市场监督仍在完善，但波季港/巴统港的海关及边境程序可能要求到港时提供合规文件；（5）开始检测前须核实当前GeoSTM认可的认证机构及适用标准版本。
gap.zht: 中國CCC證書或GB 2626檢測報告不自動滿足格魯吉亞合格評定要求。具體差距包括：（1）須從GeoSTM認可機構取得格魯吉亞GeoSTM認證——中國國內CCC無法替代；（2）檢測報告須引用適用的格魯吉亞/GOST標準，而非僅引用GB 2626；（3）格魯吉亞不接受歐亞經濟聯盟EAC標誌——持有其他獨聯體市場EAC證書的出口商不能認為該證書覆蓋格魯吉亞；（4）格魯吉亞市場監督仍在完善，但波季港/巴統港的海關及邊境程序可能要求到港時提供合規文件；（5）開始檢測前須核實當前GeoSTM認可的認證機構及適用標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Georgian national conformity certification required; EAEU EAC marking and TR CU 019/2011 do not apply in Georgia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (third-party certification by CNCA-authorised body) for GB 2626-2019 industrial respirators; NMPA registration for GB 19083 medical-protective masks

source.publisher: GeoSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgian respiratory PPE conformity requires national certification under GeoSTM — not EAEU EAC. Chinese CCC or GB 2626 test reports do not transfer automatically. Engage a GeoSTM-recognised certification body early, confirm the applicable GOST-based standard version, and ensure conformity documentation is available at Poti/Batumi port of entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚呼吸防护PPE合格评定须依据GeoSTM取得国家认证——而非欧亚经济联盟EAC。中国CCC或GB 2626检测报告不自动转换适用。应尽早联系GeoSTM认可的认证机构，确认适用的GOST基础标准版本，并确保波季港/巴统港入境时备有合规文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 格魯吉亞呼吸防護PPE合格評定須依據GeoSTM取得國家認證——而非歐亞經濟聯盟EAC。中國CCC或GB 2626檢測報告不自動轉換適用。應盡早聯繫GeoSTM認可的認證機構，確認適用的GOST基礎標準版本，並確保波季港/巴統港入境時備有合規文件。
